summary: Tested new Shop features for ASR Enterprises: Solar Wire category (6 categories total), distance-based delivery fees, No Return Policy notice, order number auto-generation, Shop Management in Admin Dashboard, mobile image upload, Razorpay payment verification with auto-record. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%), all frontend UI features verified.

issues: Products show placeholder sun icons - no images uploaded yet (minor cosmetic)

seed_data_creation: Created wire products (AC/DC 4sqmm, 6sqmm) and Solar Installation Service during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features all working: Wire category filter in Shop, distance-based delivery fees (₹50-₹300), No Return Policy notice in checkout modal, Solar Installation Service at ₹1,500, order number auto-generated with ASR prefix, Shop Management accessible at /admin/shop from Admin Dashboard, mobile/gallery image upload in product form

wire_category_filter.details: Solar Wire category filter shows 4 wire products (AC Wire 4/6sqmm, DC Wire 4/6sqmm)

wire_products_display.details: All wire products show correct prices and 'per meter' unit pricing

solar_installation_service.details: Solar Installation Service shows ₹1,500 price as specified

no_return_policy_notice.details: Red notice box in checkout: 'No Return Policy - Goods once sold cannot be taken back or exchanged'

shop_management_in_admin_dashboard.details: Shop Management card visible in Admin Dashboard with 'Products, orders & payments' description

admin_shop_page.details: /admin/shop accessible with Products and Orders tabs, stats cards

mobile_image_upload.details: Product form has 'Upload from Mobile/Gallery' option with file type/size limits

order_number_generation.details: Order numbers auto-generated with ASR prefix + date + unique ID (e.g., ASR202602224C1707)

razorpay_payment_verification.details: POST /api/shop/orders/{id}/payment-verify creates payment record, updates order status

categories_api.details: GET /api/shop/categories returns 6 categories including 'wire' and 'service' with base_price=1500

delivery_fees_api.details: GET /api/shop/delivery-fees returns correct distance-based fee structure

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/shop/categories - 200 OK, returns 6 categories with wire and service
GET /api/shop/delivery-fees - 200 OK, returns distance-based fee structure
GET /api/shop/products - 200 OK, wire products filter works
POST /api/shop/products - 200 OK, creates wire and service products
ui_tests_performed: Shop page category filters including Solar Wire
Wire products display (AC/DC Wire 4sqmm, 6sqmm with per meter pricing)
Checkout modal with distance-based delivery fee dropdown
No Return Policy notice in checkout (red warning box)
/admin/shop page with Products and Orders tabs
Add Product form with mobile/gallery image upload option
